title: Golden Yolk Bliss Paleo Bowl
description: A rich and chewy post-workout dish featuring free-range egg yolks beaten, caramelized to perfection, and served in a paleo-friendly base.
instructions: Heat coconut oil and butter in a skillet over medium heat.
Beat the eggs with optional sweetener until frothy, then pour into the skillet.
Caramelize the eggs by allowing them to cook undisturbed for about 3-5 minutes or until golden brown on the bottom.
Remove from heat and let cool slightly before serving in a paleo-friendly base such as cauliflower mash or zucchini noodles.
